design_philosophy: Neo-Brutalist Technical Dashboard. Radically functional, raw data exposure, stark contrast, and visible grid lines. 'The Anti-Cookie-Cutter'. Expose the skeleton.

rules.headings: Uppercase or tight tracking (-0.05em). Radical weight contrast (Black vs Light). Do not use 'Inter'.
rules.body: Monospace for all code context, normal tracking.

spacing_and_layout.container: Use strict grid layouts. Emphasize container bounds.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous padding for layout regions (p-8 to p-12). Dense padding for data tables/trees (p-2).
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Border-collapse style or flex with explicit borders to create the 'Technical' grid look. Avoid gaps, use borders to separate items.

components.buttons: Square corners (rounded-none), 2px solid border-black, hard brutalist drop-shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]). On hover, translate-x-[-2px] translate-y-[-2px] and expand shadow to 6px.
components.cards: Square corners, 2px solid border-black, pure white background. No soft shadows. Header separated by 2px bottom border.
components.inputs: Square corners, 2px solid border-black, focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary, font-mono placeholder-muted-foreground.
components.tabs: Borders between tabs, active tab gets a primary color bottom border (4px) or background inversion.

motion_and_interaction.hover: Brutal, snappy transitions. Instant state changes or extremely fast snappy movement (0.1s duration).
motion_and_interaction.focus: 2px solid outline in Signal Red (#FF3B30) offset by 2px.
motion_and_interaction.animations: Use ASCII or stark geometric loading states (e.g., spinning square or shifting grid) instead of smooth spinners.

image_urls.description: Abstract black and white grid fading into white.
image_urls.instructions: Use as a background pattern for empty states (like the dropzone area) or the main hero upload zone. Overlay with bg-white/80 to keep text highly readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'IBM Plex Mono' via Google Fonts and 'Cabinet Grotesk' via Fontshare (https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400,900&display=swap) in index.html.

Customize Shadcn components heavily: Remove ALL rounded corners (use `rounded-none`), replace all soft shadows with `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A]`, and ensure borders are stark black (`border-2 border-black`).
The UI should look like a high-end, brutalist developer tool. Use tabs for the input methods: React Source (.js/.jsx/.tsx), HTML paste, Image upload, URL input.
For the 'Extracted Data' view, utilize a complex, data-heavy grid layout that exposes component hierarchy, colors, fonts, and patterns. Use monospace font for the data values.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural bento/grid layouts, utilizing Shadcn primarily for interactive state logic (Tabs, Select, Accordion).
Implement `data-testid` on all buttons, tabs, inputs, and interactive elements.
Ensure hover states drastically change color or introduce a hard shadow lift, maintaining the AAA accessibility contrast.
